scripts.desktop:build: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @nervekit/web build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/orchestrator build && node scripts/copy-web-dist-to-orchestrator.mjs && pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop build
scripts.desktop:install: pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop icons && node scripts/install-desktop.mjs install --pnpm pnpm
scripts.serve: pnpm run build:deps && pnpm --filter @nervekit/cli dev -- serve --open
scripts.release:build: pnpm --filter @nervekit/shared build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/agent build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/tools build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/web build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/orchestrator build && node scripts/copy-web-dist-to-orchestrator.mjs && pnpm --filter @nervekit/cli build && pnpm --filter @nervekit/desktop build
